title: Reinforced Chests
body:
![Reinforced Chests](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Aton-Kish/reinforced-chests/1.19/images/header.png) [![Mod Loader: Fabric](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=modloader&message=fabric&color=brightgreen)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) ![Mod Environment](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=environment&message=client%2Fserver&color=yellow) [![MIT License](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=licence&message=MIT&color=blue)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Aton-Kish/reinforced-chests/1.19/LICENSE) [![Ko-fi](https://www.ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/atonkish) # Reinforced Chests The Reinforced Chests mod adds reinforced chests. [](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) | Name | Description | | --------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Copper Chest | A copper chest has 45 slots of inventory space, and a large copper chest has twice that amount, at 90 slots. | | Iron Chest | An iron chest has 54 slots of inventory space, and a large iron chest has twice that amount, at 108 slots. | | Gold Chest | A gold chest has 81 slots of inventory space, and a large gold chest has twice that amount, at 162 slots. | | Diamond Chest | A diamond chest has 108 slots of inventory space, and a large diamond chest has twice that amount, at 216 slots. | | Netherite Chest | A netherite chest has 108 slots of inventory space, and a large netherite chest has twice that amount, at 216 slots. This is resistant to blast, fire and lava. | ## Recipe | Name | Type | Recipe | | --------------- | --------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Copper Chest | N/A | N/A
It cannot be crafted after the Copper Age (Minecraft 1.21.9+). | | Iron Chest | Shaped Crafting |
It can also be crafted by Vanilla Copper Chests after the Copper Age (Minecraft 1.21.9+). | | Gold Chest | Shaped Crafting | | | Diamond Chest | Shaped Crafting | | | Netherite Chest | Smithing | | ## Configure You can configure from the [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) or by editing `config/reinfcore.json` directly. | Key | Type | Default | Description | | ------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------- | -------------------------------- | | `screenType` | `"SINGLE"` \| `"SCROLL"` | `"SINGLE"` | the screen type | | `scrollScreen.rows` | int | `6` | the number of scroll screen rows | ### Screen Type | Screen Type: `"SINGLE"` | Screen Type: `"SCROLL"` | | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | ![Single Screen](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Aton-Kish/reinforced-chests/1.19/images/modmenu/single.png) | ![Scroll Screen](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Aton-Kish/reinforced-chests/1.19/images/modmenu/scroll6.png) | ### Scroll Screen #### Rows | Rows: `6` | Rows: `9` | | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | ![Scroll Screen: 6 rows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Aton-Kish/reinforced-chests/1.19/images/modmenu/scroll6.png) | ![Scroll Screen: 9 rows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Aton-Kish/reinforced-chests/1.19/images/modmenu/scroll9.png) | ## Related projects - [Reinforced Shulker Boxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/reinforced-shulker-boxes) - [Reinforced Barrels](https://modrinth.com/mod/reinforced-barrels)
